hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: A Clanker protocol hook with configurable per-direction static LP fees (clanker vs paired token direction), dynamically updated on each swap via updateDynamicLPFee. Collects a 20% protocol fee on the non-clanker token per trade using BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta, with optional MEV protection modules and pool extensions.
